marketplace.name: Rust Skills Marketplace
marketplace.description: Comprehensive Rust programming expert skill system with 40+ specialized skills
marketplace.author: Tisen-Ray

skills.name: Rust Expert System
skills.description: Main entry point for all Rust expertise. Auto-routes to 40+ specialized sub-skills based on your question context.

skills.name: Ownership & Lifetimes
skills.description: Ownership, borrowing, and lifetime expert. Handles compiler errors E0382, E0597, E0506, E0507, E0515, E0716, E0106.

skills.name: Interior Mutability
skills.description: Interior mutability patterns with Cell, RefCell, Mutex, RwLock, Atomic types, and borrow checker rules.

skills.name: Concurrency & Async
skills.description: Concurrency and async programming expert. Handles Send, Sync, threads, async/await, tokio, channels, Mutex, RwLock, deadlock prevention.

skills.name: Error Handling
skills.description: Error handling patterns with Result, Option, ?, unwrap, error propagation, and custom error types.

skills.name: Coding Standards
skills.description: Rust coding standards, naming conventions, style guidelines, clippy lints, and best practices.

skills.name: Web Development
skills.description: Rust web development expert covering HTTP frameworks (axum, actix), REST API design, handler patterns, state management, middleware.

skills.name: Unsafe Code & FFI
skills.description: Unsafe Rust expert covering raw pointers, unions, FFI, pinning, memory layout, and safety invariants.

skills.name: Anti-Patterns
skills.description: Common Rust anti-patterns, code smells, and how to avoid them. Covers excessive clone, unwrap abuse, and architectural mistakes.

skills.name: Performance Optimization
skills.description: Performance optimization expert covering profiling, benchmarking, memory allocation, SIMD, cache optimization, false sharing, lock contention.

skills.name: Rust Learner & Ecosystem
skills.description: Rust version tracking, new features, RFCs, learning resources, and ecosystem navigation.

skills.name: Ecosystem & Crates
skills.description: Rust crate selection, library recommendations, framework comparison, and ecosystem navigation.

skills.name: Redis Caching
skills.description: Redis caching strategies with Rust, including TTL, eviction policies, connection pooling, and cache patterns.

skills.name: JWT & API Key Authentication
skills.description: Authentication patterns with JWT, API keys, session management, OAuth2, and authorization middleware.

skills.name: Web Middleware Patterns
skills.description: Middleware patterns for web applications including CORS, rate limiting, compression, logging, and request processing.

skills.name: Actor Model
skills.description: Actor model patterns in Rust, message passing, supervision trees, and actor frameworks.

skills.name: FFI & C++ Interop
skills.description: FFI expert covering C/C++ interop, bindgen, cxx, exception handling, and cross-language boundaries.

skills.name: Pin & Self-Referential
skills.description: Pin and Unpin traits, self-referential structs, pinned data, and async stream patterns.

skills.name: Macros & Procedural Macros
skills.description: Macro system expert covering declarative macros, procedural macros, derive macros, and macro hygiene.

skills.name: Async Patterns
skills.description: Advanced async patterns including Stream, Sink, backpressure, select!, futures, and async iteration.

skills.name: Advanced Async Patterns
skills.description: Advanced async patterns including tokio::spawn lifetime issues, task cancellation, timeout patterns, and plugin architecture.

skills.name: Const Generics & Compile-Time
skills.description: Const generics, compile-time evaluation, const fn, generic array sizes, and type-level computation.

skills.name: Type-Driven Design
skills.description: Type-driven design patterns including type-state, newtype pattern, PhantomData, and type-level programming.

skills.name: Complex Lifetimes
skills.description: Advanced lifetime topics including HRTB, GAT, 'static bounds, trait object lifetimes, and lifetime variance.

skills.name: XACML Policy Engine
skills.description: XACML policy engine implementation, attribute-based access control, and policy evaluation patterns.

skills.name: Testing Strategy
skills.description: Testing strategies including unit tests, integration tests, proptest, mock, loom, and criterion benchmarks.

skills.name: Database & ORM
skills.description: Database patterns with SQLx, Diesel, SeaORM, transaction handling, connection pooling, and migrations.

skills.name: Tracing & Observability
skills.description: Observability patterns including tracing, logging, metrics, OpenTelemetry, and Prometheus integration.

skills.name: Embedded & no_std
skills.description: Embedded Rust development, no_std environments, ISR handling, WASM, RISC-V, and bare-metal programming.

skills.name: Skill Index
skills.description: Index and navigation for all Rust skills, helps find the right skill for any problem.

skills.name: Linear Types & Resource Management
skills.description: Linear types, RAII patterns, destructible types, and resource management guarantees.

skills.name: Coroutines & Green Threads
skills.description: Coroutines, generators, suspend/resume patterns, and green thread implementations.

skills.name: eBPF & Kernel Programming
skills.description: eBPF programming with Rust, kernel modules, map operations, tail calls, and BPF CO-RE.

skills.name: GPU Computing
skills.description: GPU computing with Rust, CUDA bindings, GPU memory management, and compute shaders.

skills.name: DPDK High-Performance Networking
skills.description: DPDK integration, high-performance packet processing, userspace networking, and zero-copy patterns.

skills.name: Distributed Systems
skills.description: Distributed systems patterns, consensus algorithms, raft, distributed transactions, and CAP theorem.

skills.name: Resource Management
skills.description: Resource management patterns, RAII, Drop trait, cleanup guarantees, and scope-based management.

skills.name: Zero-Cost Abstractions
skills.description: Zero-cost abstractions, monomorphization, inline hints, and compile-time optimization.

skills.name: Advanced Error Handling
skills.description: Advanced error handling with thiserror, anyhow, error context, error conversion, and error reporting.

core.name: Core Skills
core.description: Essential Rust skills for daily development work

advanced.name: Advanced Skills
advanced.description: Deep knowledge for complex Rust challenges

expert.name: Expert Skills
expert.description: Specialized knowledge for edge cases and systems programming
